Sometimes a person or people or community or nation doesn't even want resolution to the pain they're experiencing, that they're bringing your or my attention to, as much as they want a witness to their pain.<|18.60|><|endoftext|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> You, I, they often just need to know that another person, people, community, or nation,<|9.16|> <|9.16|> sees them, youth minister, who is also a professional environmental<|25.60|> <|25.60|> educator.<|26.80|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> In her work, Sarah often leads students through a scientific observation exercise, and in<|7.08|> <|7.08|> that exercise, students are instructed to pick up loose objects, and while holding that<|13.94|> <|13.94|> loose object, whether it be a rock, a leaf, twig, debris, or branch in their hand, they<|20.40|> <|20.40|> are given four prompts.<|22.90|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> I notice, I wonder, I imagine, and it makes me imagine this rock hurtling toward this planet billions of years ago as part of a large asteroid.<|15.20|> <|15.20|> This rock makes me feel happy because I love spending time in the company of ancient home."<|26.30|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|1.64|> In a time when it is easy to be given over<|4.80|> <|4.80|> to rightful despair, confusion, and rage<|9.64|> <|9.64|> due to overlapping geopolitical<|12.10|> <|12.10|> and ecological catastrophes from Israel, Palestine,<|16.30|> <|16.30|> to our own neighborhoods,<|19.06|> <|19.06|> saying, "I notice, I wonder, I does,<|13.70|> <|13.70|> not only to those immediately impacted by it, but to us who witness it, either on the news or on a cross on Calvary.<|25.72|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> See?<|1.28|><|endoftext|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> I cannot end without saying that this exercise is akin to how God gazes upon us.<|10.30|> <|10.30|> And not only us, but the whole world.<|15.52|> <|15.52|> From the comfort of this sacred place to the chaos of war zones a world away.<|23.20|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> It is God in Christ who holds the Son<|4.42|> <|4.42|> and of the Holy Spirit, amen.<|7.00|> <|startoftranscript|><|en|><|transcribe|><|0.00|> Thank you.<|1.14|><|endoftext|>
